description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named fdroid build in the build stage, using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/fdroid/ci-images-client:latest and allowing the job to fail without breaking the pipeline. The job caches the .gradle directory using a cache key of $CI_JOB_NAME and always uploads the unsigned/ directory as an artifact. Its script creates build and fdroidserver directories, checks out the fdroidserver source via git and curl, sets PATH, PYTHONPATH and PYTHONUNBUFFERED, runs the fdroidserver setup script, adds a vagrant user, links the source, downloads Gradle 5.6.2, provisions Gradle and apt packages, upgrades the system, installs fdroidserver and Python dependencies, purges the temporary fdroidserver package, sets GRADLE_USER_HOME, enables command tracing, installs sudo, then executes fdroid fetchsrclibs --verbose and fdroid build --verbose --on-server --no-tarball.
